---
title: "Projects"
---

## The Dublin Explorer

An interactive dashboard accompanying my work on the fairness of asylum responsibility-sharing in the European Union. It lets users explore patterns in Dublin transfers across member states.

<!--
The iframe below embeds the live Shiny app from shinyapps.io.
Replace YOUR-ACCOUNT and YOUR-APP-URL with the actual values once known.
The free shinyapps.io tier sleeps when idle, so first load may show
several seconds of blank space while the server wakes.
-->

<iframe src="https://YOUR-ACCOUNT.shinyapps.io/YOUR-APP-URL/"
        width="100%" height="700"
        style="border: 1px solid #ddd;"
        loading="lazy">
</iframe>

If the dashboard does not load above, you can [open it directly](https://YOUR-ACCOUNT.shinyapps.io/YOUR-APP-URL/).

---

<!--
To add another project, follow this pattern:

## Project name

Short description.

[Project URL or repo link]
-->
